rationale: Internal performance optimization using Trie for deserialization; no spec behavior involved.
Internal API refactor introducing INameDecoder interface; no spec behavior change.
Heap corruption crash in native SSPI unmanaged code during Kerberos auth; implementation crash, not spec rule violation.
ObjectId uniqueness failure across app domains; implementation bug in ID generation, no spec rule contradicted.
Driver incorrectly rejects '$external' database name required for Kerberos/x509 external authentication users.
SetMaxScan renders '$maxscan' instead of spec-required '$maxScan'; wrong casing for query modifier field name.
Replica set auth failure with numeric passwords; thin description, unclear root cause, no specific spec rule named.
FindAs hangs under heavy load in ByteBufferFactory; concurrency/internal issue, no spec rule violated.
Memory leak under load with transport exceptions; internal resource management bug, no spec involvement.
Geospatial $eq query uses full scan instead of index; server query planner behavior, not driver spec issue.
EndOfStreamException reading past stream end; internal stream I/O bug, no spec rule contradicted.
LINQ Contains generates invalid regex '/s' flag; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, not a spec conformance issue.
JsonWriter outputs wrong Extended JSON for BsonMaxKey, BsonMinKey, BsonTimestamp, BsonUndefined; violates BSON Extended JSON spec formats.
ReplicaSetTagSet.GetHashCode broken causing server instance limit exceeded; internal hashing bug, no spec rule violated.
Fix build warnings on Mono; build/tooling issue, no spec behavior involved.
Add logging/eventing infrastructure to driver; internal observability feature, no spec conformance issue.
Move connection pool caching from legacy MongoServer to new location; internal refactor, no behavior change.
Remove redundant MongoConnectionStringBuilder class; API cleanup, no behavioral spec divergence between named drivers.
Move exception types into Core library; internal refactor for API compatibility, no spec behavior change.
Unify ReadPreference type across legacy and Core APIs; internal API consolidation, no spec behavior change.
Unify WriteConcern type across legacy and Core APIs; internal API consolidation, no spec behavior change.
Improve error message when read preference silently switched to primary; UX/messaging improvement, not spec violation.
Driver fails to detect 'jnote' journaling error when ok:1; write concern spec requires detecting this server-reported error condition.
Replace CheckElementNames booleans with flexible IElementNameValidator; internal API refactor, no spec behavior change.
Readonly id field causes duplicate key via NamedIdMemberConvention; internal serialization convention bug, no spec rule violated.
SslSettings.Equals fails to compare X509CertificateCollection correctly; internal .NET API usage bug, no spec involvement.
Float-to-BsonDouble precision loss; internal type conversion improvement, no BSON spec rule on float-to-double precision.
Add ConfigureAwait(false) to async library calls; internal performance/correctness improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Integrate SDAM spec tests into the driver test suite; depends on DRIVERS-182, test infrastructure update.
Server selection spec forbids tag sets with Primary mode; driver currently allows this invalid combination without error.
Clarify misleading obsolete attribute message on SafeMode; documentation/messaging fix, no spec behavior involved.
BsonCreatorMap uses non-unique MetadataToken causing BsonInternalException; internal reflection bug, no spec rule violated.
Add query hint support to count operation; new feature addition, not a spec nonconformance bug.
Deprecate CommandResult and add new exception properties; API evolution/improvement, no spec conformance issue.
cursor.Count() sends command to primary ignoring SecondaryPreferred read preference; server selection spec requires honoring read preference for count.
Deprecate MongoClient.GetServer() and remove MongoServer.Create(); API cleanup for legacy entry points, no spec nonconformance.
Reduce DLL dependencies; build/packaging concern, no spec behavior involved.
Remove _bsonType field from BsonValue to save memory; internal memory optimization, no spec behavior change.
Cache BSON array index name UTF8 values for performance; internal optimization, no spec behavior change.
Postpone BsonDocument internal dictionary creation for small documents; memory/perf optimization, no spec behavior change.
Summary explicitly says 'in compliance with SDAM spec'; driver did not handle 'not master' errors per the SDAM specification.
connectTimeoutMS not applied at socket level; spec-defined setting not honored at correct connection stage.
Remove deprecated legacy API members; internal API cleanup, no spec conformance issue.
Add ConnectionId to MongoException for diagnostics; new API feature for log correlation, no spec nonconformance.
SDAM spec defines minHeartbeatFrequencyMS behavior when waiting for suitable server; driver not implementing this correctly.
Add IndexOfName helper method to BsonDocument; new convenience API, no spec behavior involved.
Remove SharedConnectionPool class; internal architecture decision to drop pipelined connections, not a spec issue.
Change BsonElement from class to struct for memory savings; internal optimization, no spec behavior change.
Remove cross-project test reference to avoid unintended access; test build/structure issue, no spec behavior involved.
Introduce IBsonReader/IBsonWriter interfaces for testability; API improvement, no spec conformance issue.
